response.original_title: What Is the Uphold Verification Code? Login, Security & Verification Explained
response.overview: a temporary, one-time 6-digit security code ☎+1-[888]-574-[7167] sent to your registered email, mobile phone (SMS), or authenticator app. Uphold verification is a mandatory ☎+1-[888]-574-[7167] Know Your Customer (KYC) process that requires you to prove your identity and residential address.  When verifying your phone number in the ☎+1-[888]-574-[7167] Uphold sandbox environment, use the verification code "000000" when you're prompted,☎+1-[888]-574-[7167]  rather than using a code generated  The process typically consists of the following steps:  Information Submission: You provide basic personal details, ☎+1-[888]-574-[7167] including your full legal name, date of birth, phone number, and residential address.
